# C# VBE COM Add-in Project

## Project Overview
A C# COM add-in for VBA Editor (VBE) that adds a custom ribbon menu with code formatting functionality.

## Progress Checklist
- [x] Create copilot-instructions.md file
- [x] Scaffold C# COM add-in project structure
- [ ] Customize project for VBE ribbon functionality
- [ ] Install dependencies and compile project
- [ ] Create comprehensive documentation

## Project Details
- **Type**: C# COM Add-in for VBA Editor
- **Framework**: .NET Framework 4.8
- **Language**: C#
- **Key Features**: 
  - Custom ribbon in VBE
  - Dim statement indentation formatter
  - COM registration for VBA Editor

## Development Notes
- Project targets .NET Framework for COM interop compatibility
- Requires Microsoft.Vbe.Interop and Office.Core references
- Must be registered as COM add-in for VBE
